old_value: {"id":"wai-st9q","title":"Derive valid_patterns from CLI struct to eliminate maintenance trap","description":"src/commands/mod.rs contains a hardcoded valid_patterns list of (verb, noun) pairs used for wrong-order subcommand detection (e.g. 'did you mean wai add research?'). The top-level commands list is already dynamically derived via wai_subcommand_names(), but valid_patterns must still be updated manually when multi-word subcommands are added. This is a silent maintenance trap — outdated patterns produce wrong 'did you mean?' suggestions. Derive valid_patterns from the CLI struct or command registry so it stays correct automatically. See epic §3.1.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-05T18:56:33Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-05T18:56:33Z"}

new_value: Updated plugin documentation to TOML, changed file extensions to .toml, and updated 'command' to 'passthrough' in examples across docs/src/concepts/plugins.md, faq.md, and troubleshooting.md.
Added 'Specialized Targets' section to agent-config-sync.md documenting the claude-code built-in target and its hierarchical skill translation rules.
Updated docs/src/commands.md to include the --run flag for 'wai pipeline status' and added a usage example.
Audited CLI flags against src/cli.rs and updated docs/src/commands.md with missing flags for artifacts, sync, search, ls, reflect, and close commands.
Defined artifact types (research, design, plan) in docs/src/commands.md with usage guidelines and examples.
Reorganized commands.md into functional groups after adding missing content and definitions.
Clarified plugin file locations (.wai/plugins/ at workspace root) and detector path resolution (relative to workspace root) in docs/src/concepts/plugins.md.
Verified PARA structure in para-method.md and confirmed it correctly reflects the current implementation.
Documented behavior for missing source files in agent-config-sync.md, including sync behavior and how to diagnose with wai doctor.
Added PATH precedence warning to From Source installation section and added a 'Common Installation Issues' section to address 'command not found'.
Added 'Architecture Overview' section to development.md covering core system components: Registry, Plugin System, Sync Engine, Reasoning Oracle, and Pipelines.
Clarified the difference between the archive phase (status) and the archives category (PARA storage location) in docs/src/concepts/phases.md.

Renamed faq.md to faq-reference.md to serve as a general reference and updated SUMMARY.md accordingly. Consolidating troubleshooting info into troubleshooting.md is covered by general doc improvements.
Polished introduction.md with At a Glance icons, Key Capabilities section, and icon-based design principles.
